title: Omit Unnecessary Semicolons For Cleaner Code
description: Cleaner code is preferable for better code readability and maintainability. Unnecessary semicolons, especially at the end of a try-with-resources construct, should be omitted.
recommendation: Remove the unnecessary semicolon at the end of the try-with-resources construct.
impact: Improves code readability and maintainability by removing unnecessary syntax.

checks.message: Remove unnecessary semicolons for cleaner code.
